tool.name: nmap_scan
tool.description: Run an nmap network scan on a target.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Target host or IP address to scan.

parameter.name: ports
parameter.description: Port range to scan (e.g. '1-1000', '80,443', default: top ports).

tool.name: nikto_scan
tool.description: Run a Nikto web vulnerability scan on a target.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Target URL or host to scan (e.g. 'http://example.com').

tool.name: sqlmap_scan
tool.description: Run sqlmap for SQL injection testing on a target URL.

tool.name: semgrep_scan
tool.description: Run semgrep static analysis on a target directory to find code vulnerabilities and bugs.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Directory or file path to scan (default: /workspace/source).

tool.name: bandit_scan
tool.description: Run bandit Python security scanner on a target directory.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Directory or file path to scan (default: /workspace/source).

tool.name: gitleaks_scan
tool.description: Run gitleaks to detect hardcoded secrets and credentials in source code.

tool.name: trufflehog_scan
tool.description: Run trufflehog to find and verify secrets in source code.

tool.name: eslint_scan
tool.description: Run ESLint static analysis on JavaScript/TypeScript files.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Directory or file path to scan (default: /workspace/source).
